description: Business logic context for GlobalHR Cloud - helps AI understand the system's modules and workflows

modules.login: Authentication module at /login. Requires username (or idnumber) and password. Success redirects to Dashboard.
modules.dashboard: Landing page after login. Shows attendance summary, leave balance, and quick actions.
modules.leave: Leave management module. Submit leave requests with type, date range, and half-day options. Balance validation required.
modules.attendance: Attendance tracking. Shows monthly summaries, absent days, and check-in/out records.
modules.payroll: Payroll processing. Calculates salary with OT, allowances, and deductions.

apiPatterns.GetMonthyAttendanceSummaryAbsentDay: Returns monthly attendance absent day count for an employee
apiPatterns.GetAttendanceSummaryCount: Returns attendance summary statistics (present, absent, late counts)
apiPatterns.GetAllLeavePolicyForGroupPolicy: Returns all leave policies for a group, used in leave configuration
apiPatterns.GetLeavepolicyByID: Returns specific leave policy details by ID

template:
### GlobalHR Business Logic Context
You are generating automated tests for "GlobalHR Cloud", an enterprise-grade HR management software built with Angular and Kendo UI.

## Authentication Module (`/login`)
- Requires valid `username` (or idnumber) and `password`.
- Successful login redirects to the Dashboard (`/dashboard`).
- Use `process.env.TEST_USER` and `process.env.TEST_PASS` for credentials.

## Dashboard & Page Extractions
- If you see a `page_extraction` event, use the provided components to understand available UI elements.
- Only generate code for explicit `click` or `input` actions, not every extracted element.

## API Endpoints to Monitor
- `GetMonthyAttendanceSummaryAbsentDay` — Attendance absent day count
- `GetAttendanceSummaryCount` — Attendance statistics
- `GetAllLeavePolicyForGroupPolicy` — Leave policy list
- `GetLeavepolicyByID` — Specific leave policy details
When these APIs appear in fetch events, generate `page.waitForResponse()` assertions.

## Reliability & Wait Strategies
- GlobalHR may have loading spinners during API calls.
- Rely on Playwright's auto-waiting. Do NOT use `page.waitForTimeout()` unless absolutely necessary.
- For dynamic Kendo components, ensure the element is visible before interacting.

## Environment Structure
- Testing: `https://test.globalhr.com.mm/{CUSTOMER_ID}/...`
- UAT: `https://uat.globalhr.com.mm/{CUSTOMER_ID}/...`
- Live: `https://globalhr.com.mm/{CUSTOMER_ID}/...`
NEVER hardcode these URLs. Use `process.env.BASE_URL` and `process.env.CUSTOMER_ID`.
